body.title: close_task_by_name tool — proper fix for task-closure habit
body.result: close_task_by_name() built in ops.py — phrase extraction, exact+semantic search, status=closed on match. Habit 20260310192223347663 updated cognitive→tool with code_ref=tools.ops:close_task_by_name.
body.description: Build close_task_by_name(text: str) tool: extract task name from text, search cortex for matching episodic/task memories, update metadata status=closed. Convert memory 20260310192223347663 habit_type from cognitive to tool, add code_ref=tools.close_task:close_task_by_name. Fixes HABIT_FALLTHROUGH on threading-shaky cognitive dispatch. response_template fallback already added as interim.
